assertions.description: Output contains three sections (Opening 3-5 questions, Core 6-10 questions with follow-up prompts, Closing 3-4 questions) plus an Overflow section
No question anywhere in the set is answerable with yes or no, and core questions include specific follow-up prompts (not generic 'tell me more')
Sensitive topics are flagged with NOTE tags and the output ends with a Next Step note about which opening question to lead with
